Bash(python -c "
import sqlite3
db = 'C:/Users/Karen/source/repos/CSM/CSMBiometricoWPF/bin/x86/Debug/net8.0-windows/csm_biometrico.db'
conn = sqlite3.connect\(db\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('SELECT estado_ingreso, COUNT\(*\) FROM registros_ingreso GROUP BY estado_ingreso'\)
for row in cur.fetchall\(\):
    print\(row\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import sqlite3
db = 'C:/Users/Karen/source/repos/CSM/CSMBiometricoWPF/bin/x86/Debug/net8.0-windows/csm_biometrico.db'
conn = sqlite3.connect\(db\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM registros_ingreso'\)

print\(f'Total registros: {total}'\)
cur.execute\('SELECT id_registro, fecha_ingreso, hora_ingreso, estado_ingreso FROM registros_ingreso ORDER BY fecha_ingreso'\)
for row in cur.fetchall\(\):
    print\(row\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import sqlite3
db = 'C:/Users/Karen/source/repos/CSM/CSMBiometricoWPF/bin/x86/Debug/net8.0-windows/csm_biometrico.db'
conn = sqlite3.connect\(db\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('DELETE FROM registros_ingreso'\)
cur.execute\('DELETE FROM huellas_digitales'\)
cur.execute\('DELETE FROM estudiantes'\)
conn.commit\(\)
print\('registros_ingreso eliminados:', cur.rowcount\)
cur.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM estudiantes'\)
print\('Estudiantes restantes:', cur.fetchone\(\)[0]\)
conn.close\(\)
")
